description: Request body to create a new governance proposal (POST /v1/proposals, proposals_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'goal' is required.

goal.description: Natural-language description of the change this proposal intends to make.

actions.description: List of action descriptors (action_id + parameters) to include in the proposal. Empty list is valid (governor-fills later).

files.description: Scope files to include in the proposal. Empty list means unrestricted scope.

created_by.description: Caller identity recorded on the proposal row. Defaults to 'cli_operator'.

write.description: When true (default), persist the proposal. When false, return a dry-run preview.
